description: Attach a call-log entry to an existing NetHunt record.

record_id.description: NetHunt record identifier returned by record feeds, search, or create operations.
record_id.title: Record Id

text.description: Plain-text content to store in the comment or call-log body.
text.title: Text

time.description: Optional ISO-style timestamp string to attach to the call log.
time.title: Time

name: create_call_log
